items.name: Hot Pepper Launcher
items.description: That's a spicy pepper!  Shoot red, green, and yellow peppers at your foes. When your foes get hit by a red pepper, they will turn red and run around, flailing their arms uncontrollably! Green makes your opponents vomit greenish bricks. If your foes get hit with a yellow pepper, their speed will be reduced.  Each pepper does 20 damage per hit!
